use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF BRONCHOSPASM ASSOCIATED WITH COPD IN PATIENTS REQUIRING MORE THAN ONE BRONCHO DILATOR

indications.text:
DuoNeb is indicated for the treatment of bronchospasm associated with COPD in patients
requiring more than one bronchodilator.
